context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct Shopify Storefront API package, the createStorefrontApiClient factory function, the current API version, and properly distinguishes between public (client-side) and private (server-side) token configurations.

checklist.name: Correct npm package
checklist.description: Uses @shopify/storefront-api-client as the npm package (not shopify-buy, @shopify/shopify-api, or any other package)

checklist.name: createStorefrontApiClient factory
checklist.description: Uses createStorefrontApiClient() (imported from @shopify/storefront-api-client) to instantiate the client

checklist.name: API version 2025-01
checklist.description: Sets apiVersion to "2025-01" in the client configuration

checklist.name: publicAccessToken for client-side
checklist.description: Uses the publicAccessToken field (not privateAccessToken) in the client-side/browser-facing client configuration

checklist.name: privateAccessToken for server-side
checklist.description: Uses the privateAccessToken field (not publicAccessToken) in the server-side client configuration

checklist.name: Private token env var
checklist.description: The private access token is read from a non-NEXT_PUBLIC_ environment variable (e.g. SHOPIFY_STOREFRONT_PRIVATE_TOKEN), ensuring it is NOT exposed to the browser

checklist.name: Public token env var
checklist.description: The public access token is read from a NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefixed environment variable (e.g. NEXT_PUBLIC_SHOPIFY_STOREFRONT_TOKEN), making it safe for browser use

checklist.name: Two separate clients
checklist.description: Creates two distinct client instances: one for public/client-side use and one for private/server-side use

checklist.name: storeDomain config
checklist.description: Passes a storeDomain (the myshopify.com domain) to the client configuration

checklist.name: Server-side data fetch uses private client
checklist.description: Any server-side data fetching (e.g. getStaticProps, React Server Component, route handler) uses the private/server client instance, not the public one
